title: Making Decisions

contentBlocks.text: if lets your code make decisions. If the condition is True, the indented code below it runs.
Don't forget the colon : at the end of the if line, and indent the line(s) underneath it.
There's a variable called score. Write an if/else that prints "You win!" if score is greater than or equal to 50, otherwise prints "Try again!".

testCases.failureMessage: With score = 75, your code should print exactly: You win!

hints: Indent the next line and print("You win!") inside the if block.
Add else: on its own line, then indent print("Try again!") underneath it.
